nl_query: For each course in the current academic year, show the number of students registered, number of scripts attempted, number absent, number barred, and the pass percentage based on published results with final marks at least 40 percent of the paper total.
failed_sql: SELECT au.code AS course_code, au.name AS course_name, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.student_id) AS registered_students, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS scripts_attempted, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.lifecycle_status = 'ABSENT' THEN a.student_id END) AS absent_students, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.lifecycle_status = 'BARRED' THEN a.student_id END) AS barred_students, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.final_marks >= 0.4 * qp.total_marks THEN a.student_id END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sc.student_id), 0), 2) AS pass_percentage FROM academic_unit au JOIN exam_schedule_cache esc ON au.id = esc.course_id JOIN exam_student_mapping escm ON esc.id = escm.exam_id JOIN student_cache sc ON escm.student_id = sc.student_id JOIN answer_script a ON sc.urn = a.urn JOIN question_paper qp ON a.qp_id = qp.id JOIN result r ON a.id = r.script_id WHERE r.published_at IS NOT NULL AND esc.academic_year = '2025-2026' GROUP BY au.code, au.name ORDER BY pass_percentage ASC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): exam_schedule_cache.id, student_cache.urn, answer_script.qp_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
